rationale: Ground truth has no substantive concerns (just an approving 'lgtm' and a bot notice), so both candidates correctly recall everything by recommending APPROVE with grounded, diff-matching analysis of this trivial rename fix. Y is slightly more precise and disciplined: it explicitly states its checkout reflects PR-time state, cites more granular file/line evidence per hunk, and adds a useful sweep confirming other serving accessors are unaffected, whereas X's 'grepped post-merge' phrasing is confusing/inaccurate for a pre-merge review and its specific upstream line-number claims (api_server.py:387,489) are unverifiable assertions that add fabrication risk without real added value.
